center.name: 大巴哈马岛
center.summary: Grand Bahama is the northernmost of the islands of the Bahamas.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olive-capped warbler (Setophaga pityophila) is a species of New World warbler that is native to the western and eastern ends of Cuba as well as Grand Bahama and the Abaco Islands in the Bahamas
